meaning: n.鍋氱焊娴嗙敤鐨勭（纰庝箣鏈ㄦ枡
examples: Research of complex cellulases treating groundwood pulp was carried out.
Woodfree pulp: pulp which is processed chemically and which contains no mechanical groundwood.
Consists of white groundwood free paper in forms manufactured for use in data processing machines.
